creator: github.com

evidence.text: Mercedes-Benz unified their DevOps platform on GitHub, and in July 2023 adopted GitHub Copilot to accelerate productivity and innovation, boost collaboration, and improve developer experience. Today, more than 5,000 developers at Mercedes-Benz use Copilot and Copilot Chat to write code faster, with fewer errors, and employ a more diverse set of possible solutions. To date, they have accepted more than two million lines of code.
